Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0920 "SILKWORM-7B00-0920" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $7b00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Silkworm.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $7B00 which zeroes out the tape buffer to avoid a corrupted sprite being displayed in-game when using the crunched PRG. It then jumps to the entry point at $0920 (it couldn't use RTS because of the zeroing overwriting the boot code).
